arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Nico Williams update as Chelsea prepare €50m offer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly preparing a €50 million offer for Como winger Assane Diao in a deal that could boost Arsenal ’s chances of landing Nico Williams . The Spanish outlet claims that Chelsea view Diao as a “promising prospect” and they are reportedly expected to intensify their pursuit ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they continue to search for the best young talents in world football.

arts.ttl: 'The right path': Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a £6m talent in their ranks who's truly 'fantastic to work with'
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has overseen a major rebuild at the club since he took the reins in 2019, turning the North Londoners into a...

Oliver Glasner’s side cross the capital for this game sitting 12th in the table, meaning their season rests on the German’s ability to navigate a way past Villa on the weekend to set up a third-ever FA Cup final against either Manchester City or Nottingham Forest. Gabriel Martinelli has scored more Premier League goals against Crystal Palace (6 in 9 games) than he has against any other side.

arts.ttl: What needs to happen in Arsenal vs Crystal Palace for Liverpool to win Premier League TONIGHT
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool are closing in on being crowned Premier League champions and the title could be theirs before they step onto the pitch for their 34th league match

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta set to make drastic Arsenal decision before PSG as Bukayo Saka plan revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal players will have some extra days off after Wednesday night's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace as they look to prepare for next week's Champions League semi-final first leg against Paris Saint-Germain. "Especially because of where some other players are coming [back from] and the amount of minutes that they can play, but it's good to have a little gap, because we are really short in numbers."

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Crystal Palace: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Crystal Palace in the Premier League for their final game before the Champions League semifinals vs. PSG.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta drops team news hint after Virgil van Dijk's title claim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is expected to name a strong team against Crystal Palace tonight despite Arsenal's focus already shifting to next week's showdown against PSG in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Crystal Palace can help Arsenal lock down counter kings PSG in the Champions League
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Mikel Arteta knows he cannot afford to look past Crystal Palace while the minds of many Gunners fans are already on the Champions League and PSG next week.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace’s pre-FA Cup semi-final scheduling is unfair, says Oliver Glasner
arts.sum: Opponents Aston Villa have an extra day to prepare ‘You are shouting against the wind and nobody hears you’ Oliver Glasner has complained that the buildup to Crystal Palace’s FA Cup semi-final against Aston Villa is unfair, after the Premier League turned down a request from the London club to have both sides play on the same night in midweek. Villa were in action at Manchester City on Tuesday night while Palace travel to the Emirates Stadium 24 hours later. Continue reading...
